headline: Indiana GOP Cucks Trump 🍊😩, Torpedoes Gerry Map 💥🗺️
text:
Hoosier RINOs 🐷🚫 just YEETED 🚀 Trump's THICC gerrymander BOMB 💣🗺️ in super red Indiana 🇺🇸🔴 – 21 Senate MAGA bros 🤠 joined 10 Dem simps 👈 to SLAY it 31-19 😤💀! House passed it last week 🏛️📜 but Senate said 'NOPE' 🙅‍♂️ cuz it was primed to FLIP both blue seats 🔵➡️🔴 for midterms 2026 🗳️📈. Trump Daddy 🍊👑 RAGING on Truth Social 📱💥, calling Senate boss Rodric Bray 'THE ONLY ANTI-REPUBLICAN IN USA' 😂🤡 – bro, these Hoosiers ain't scared of your BIG STICK ENERGY 🍆🚫!

Death threats ☠️💣, swatting raids 🚔😱 hitting DOZEN GOP lawmakers – White House lobbied MONTHS 🕰️, Trump hosted feasts at Mar-a-Lago vibes 🏰🍗, even sent VP JD Vance 🥜📦 TWICE to Indiana for pep talks 💨👊! But Sen. Spencer Deery 💪🗣️ dropped TRUTH BOMBS: 'Mid-cycle gerry is UNCONSERVATIVE AF 😤 – fed gov BULLYING states? HARD PASS 🚫!' Gov Mike Braun 😞📱 whining on X: 'Disappointed, gonna TEAM with Trump to OWN these traitors ‼️' – Hoosiers be like 'STAY IN YOUR LANE, DUDE' 🛣️😏!

Libs JUBILANT 🎉🍾 – activist Keith 'Wildstyle' Paschall 🕺📢 spilling: 'RELIEF CITY 🏙️😌, thought we'd need courts ⚖️ but STATEHOUSE SLAYED IT 🔥!' Map was gonna GERRY Indianapolis hoods 🏘️🖤, potentially BOOT black Rep André Carson 🚪👋 – Trump agenda CUMBLING 💦📉 after Dem off-year WINS 🏆🔵! Bannon on War Room podcast 🎙️🍿 PANICKING: 'HUGE PROBLEM 🚨 – need NET 10 seats or House SLIPS AWAY 😱!' Texas GOP already MOONED 📈🍑 with SCOTUS greenlight 🚀⚖️ adding 5 seats after race-block drama 🏎️🚫, Cali Dems mirroring with their own 5-seat ORGY 💦🔵!

Utah ⛰️, Ohio 🏭, NH 🍁, Missouri 🌽, Illinois 🌆 all in redistrict wars 🗺️⚔️ – but Indiana REBELS flipping script like MTG rage-quit vibes 🍑💥! Trump’s 'REDRAW TO WIN' rally cry 📣🔴 falling FLAT 😩🫧 nationwide, GOP sweating midterms like NVDA bubble fears 📉😰 – WHO'S THE CUCK NOW, DON? 🐔🍊😂!
